data.name: Status.Unavailable
data.value: Service unavailable - start or restart HostsGuardSvc, then reconnect. Details: {0}

data.name: Tools_AppVpnBinding_Help
data.value: Bind one program to an adapter by blocking it on other active interfaces. Default outbound and hosts-file blocks are unchanged.

data.name: FwRules_PackageTip
data.value: Optional MSIX package family name or package SID. Use either package or program, not both.

data.name: FwRules_IncludeWindowsRulesTip
data.value: Index current Windows Firewall rules in this view. Read-only; nothing on the live firewall changes.

data.name: FwRules_HostsGuardOnlyTip
data.value: Show only rules created and managed by HostsGuard.

data.name: FwRules_CreateNeedsName
data.value: Enter a name to create this rule.

data.name: FwRules_CreateChooseOneTarget
data.value: Choose either a package or a program path, not both.

data.name: FwRules_CreateReady
data.value: Ready to create this HostsGuard-managed rule.

data.name: Xaml_Replace_the_live_hosts_file_with_b6081ef3
data.value: Replace the live hosts file with a picked file (backs up the current one first)

data.name: Xaml_Save_the_whole_policy_â_domains_f8586b5d
data.value: Save the whole policy - domains, firewall rules, schedules, profiles, locks, subscriptions - as one portable JSON file

data.name: Xaml_Reconstruct_the_policy_from_an_exported_d0d84c0e
data.value: Reconstruct the policy from an exported JSON file (merges into the current machine)

data.name: Xaml_Write_unsaved_Raw_Editor_changes_to_bdb2f9f1
data.value: Write unsaved Raw Editor changes to the hosts file

data.name: Xaml_Clear_every_filter_and_toggle_back_ef9c2076
data.value: Clear every filter and toggle, back to defaults at 100% scale

data.name: About_Description
data.value: Hosts-file protection, firewall control, live network visibility, and outbound consent in one local desktop app.

data.name: About_ProtectionBody
data.value: The elevated service owns policy changes; the desktop app remains unelevated.

data.name: About_PrivacyBody
data.value: Policy, monitoring, and diagnostics stay on this PC unless you explicitly export them.

data.name: Xaml_Blocked_entries_currently_written_to_the_13a1cafc
data.value: Blocked entries currently written to the Windows hosts file

data.name: Xaml_Managed_domains_set_to_allowed_â_2b3fb277
data.value: Managed domains set to allowed - these always win over blocklists

data.name: Xaml_Filtering_mode_â_switch_from_the_340a5c61
data.value: Filtering mode - switch from the tray menu

data.name: Xaml_Block_new_outbound_traffic_unless_an_9797ef1d
data.value: Block new outbound traffic unless an allow rule covers it

data.name: Xaml_Filters_as_you_type_supports_field_900279c6
data.value: Filters as you type - supports field:value, !term, and field!=value

data.name: Xaml_Have_DeepSeek_research_what_each_domain_68c1899f
data.value: Have DeepSeek research what each domain without a Purpose is for (results are saved to the AI knowledge log)

data.name: Xaml_Hide_reverse_DNS_PTR_lookups_in_667e1814
data.value: Hide reverse-DNS PTR lookups (*.in-addr.arpa) - background noise, not real destinations

data.name: Xaml_Group_feed_rows_by_root_domain_5a130da0
data.value: Group feed rows by root domain

data.name: Xaml_Hide_every_domain_currently_listed_under_28de8cef
data.value: Hide every domain currently listed under this root (remembered)

data.name: Xaml_Block_every_selected_domain_multi_select_01215dea
data.value: Block every selected domain (multi-select with Ctrl/Shift)

data.name: Xaml_Allow_every_selected_domain_â_remove_85f98590
data.value: Allow every selected domain - remove from hosts AND whitelist against future blocklists (multi-select with Ctrl/Shift)

data.name: Xaml_Remove_the_selected_domains_0_0_f3c604ab
data.value: Remove the selected domains' 0.0.0.0 entries from the hosts file so they resolve again - useful when a page was over-blocked

data.name: Xaml_Hide_every_selected_domain_from_the_c9919958
data.value: Hide every selected domain from the feed (remembered) - multi-select with Ctrl/Shift

data.name: Xaml_Hide_the_whole_root_including_future_f3fb6200
data.value: Hide the whole root, including future subdomains (remembered)

data.name: Xaml_Hide_every_domain_currently_listed_under_bd945a60
data.value: Hide every domain currently listed under this row's root (keyboard-accessible group hide)

data.name: Xaml_Correct_this_domain_s_purpose_â_0a507959
data.value: Correct this domain's purpose - remembered as a user override that beats the AI

data.name: Xaml_Correct_this_domain_s_category_â_c06fdadd
data.value: Correct this domain's category - remembered as a user override that beats the AI

data.name: Xaml_HostsGuard_will_fill_this_feed_as_6cba4cd0
data.value: HostsGuard will fill this feed as DNS events arrive. Check the service connection, then refresh if activity should already be available.

data.name: Xaml_The_inspector_keeps_row_details_and_19beece8
data.value: The inspector keeps row details and frequent actions visible while the feed keeps updating.

data.name: Xaml_Have_DeepSeek_categorize_every_hosts_file_3b37a22a
data.value: Have DeepSeek categorize every hosts-file entry and organize the file under '# Category' sections (existing sections are reused)

data.name: Xaml_Enter_a_domain_then_add_it_67b6f1e2
data.value: Enter a domain, then add it to managed blocks

data.name: Xaml_Filters_as_you_type_â_supports_a2c98d15
data.value: Filters as you type - supports field:value, !term, and field!=value

data.name: Xaml_Add_a_domain_above_or_import_5ac9415e
data.value: Add a domain above or import a blocklist. If you are filtering, clear the filter and refresh.

data.name: Xaml_The_service_did_not_return_the_e87954a3
data.value: The service did not return the curated catalog. Reconnect to the service, then refresh subscriptions.

data.name: Xaml_Allowlist_URLs_one_per_line_â_67b8a98c
data.value: Allowlist URLs (one per line - whitelisted domains always win over blocklists)

data.name: Xaml_Write_the_edited_text_back_to_11af2855
data.value: Write the edited text back to the hosts file (enabled once the text changes)

data.name: Xaml_Discard_edits_and_reload_the_hosts_7d7d2853
data.value: Discard edits and reload the hosts file from disk

data.name: Xaml_Set_the_default_outbound_action_to_26ed8581
data.value: Set the default outbound action to Block on all firewall profiles

data.name: Xaml_Surface_trust_prompts_for_processes_making_2f0de78c
data.value: Surface trust prompts for processes making new connections

data.name: Xaml_Record_new_processes_silently_instead_of_e83fd128
data.value: Record new processes silently instead of prompting

data.name: Xaml_Child_process_auto_allow_a_direct_f67d601b
data.value: Child-process auto-allow: a direct child of an app that already has an allow rule inherits its allow for 1 hour instead of prompting (opt-in; deny-by-default when off)

data.name: Xaml_Inbound_connection_consent_also_prompt_on_2905613f
data.value: Inbound-connection consent: also prompt on unruled inbound connections and let you create inbound rules (opt-in; off by default because unsolicited inbound is noisy)

data.name: Xaml_Close_matching_IPv4_TCP_flows_on_block_b80df497
data.value: Close matching IPv4 TCP flows on block

data.name: Xaml_Opt_in_closes_matching_established_899aa84d
data.value: Opt-in: closes matching established IPv4 TCP flows after IP, app, consent, or kill-switch blocks. IPv6 is reported unsupported.

data.name: Xaml_Have_DeepSeek_explain_what_each_connection_bf26cd35
data.value: Have DeepSeek explain what each connection is likely for (fills the Info column; results are saved to the AI knowledge log)

data.name: Xaml_Resolve_remote_IPs_with_reverse_DNS_037e338f
data.value: Resolve remote IPs with reverse DNS

data.name: Xaml_Reverse_DNS_remote_IPs_the_live_91aea662
data.value: Reverse-DNS remote IPs the live DNS cache didn't cover, filling the Site column

data.name: Xaml_Group_the_live_connections_under_their_5f76fe48
data.value: Group the live connections under their owning process

data.name: Xaml_Group_the_live_connections_by_remote_925f45c1
data.value: Group the live connections by remote country (triage axis); combine with Group by app to nest

data.name: Xaml_Explain_the_current_rule_decision_for_04e02131
data.value: Explain the current rule decision for a domain, IP, process name, or executable path

data.name: Xaml_Show_the_ordered_hosts_firewall_trust_7b7cc959
data.value: Show the ordered hosts/firewall/trust/posture decision chain for the entered target

data.name: Xaml_Block_the_resolved_domain_via_the_9b0f5c9b
data.value: Block the resolved domain via the hosts file (durable - survives IP rotation); falls back to the IP when unresolved

data.name: Xaml_Block_site_for_this_app_firewall_154a0d67
data.value: Block this site for this app (firewall)

data.name: Xaml_Create_a_per_app_domain_firewall_rule_154a0d67
data.value: Create a per-app HG_Domain firewall rule whose IPs follow DNS answers; safer than global IP blocking on CDN-shared addresses

data.name: Xaml_Whitelist_the_resolved_domain_via_the_8decb985
data.value: Whitelist the resolved domain via the hosts file

data.name: Xaml_Immediately_close_this_established_IPv4_TCP_b0037bc9
data.value: Immediately close this established IPv4 TCP connection. UDP and IPv6 are not torn down.

data.name: Xaml_Show_the_ordered_hosts_firewall_trust_1ac7557b
data.value: Show the ordered hosts/firewall/trust/posture decision chain for this connection

data.name: Xaml_Look_up_the_connection_s_resolved_247f9d9a
data.value: Look up the connection's resolved domain (or IP) on threat-intel sites

data.name: Xaml_Connections_appear_here_when_the_monitor_79a98f2a
data.value: Connections appear here when the monitor is running and applications open network sessions. The status bar shows whether the service is connected.

data.name: Xaml_The_inspector_keeps_endpoint_identity_service_59af2ece
data.value: The inspector keeps endpoint identity, service attribution, and block actions visible during live triage.

data.name: Xaml_Alerts_will_appear_here_when_3f0d73ac
data.value: Alerts appear here when HostsGuard detects security-relevant changes. Use Refresh to reload the inbox or adjust alert type settings on the right.

data.name: Xaml_Stateful_low_volume_alerts_for_security_relevant_97175abd
data.value: Stateful low-volume alerts for security-relevant changes. Toasts remain separate.

data.name: Xaml_Show_only_alert_types_configured_to_baa98b18
data.value: Show only alert types configured to surface in the inbox

data.name: Xaml_Remove_every_auto_allow_â_apps_163401e7
data.value: Remove every auto-allow - apps prompt again next time

data.name: Xaml_Promote_every_auto_allow_to_a_d9f8f8a6
data.value: Promote every auto-allow to a permanent allow rule

data.name: Xaml_Play_a_sound_when_a_connection_2bc200d4
data.value: Play a sound when a connection is blocked

data.name: Xaml_Play_a_system_sound_when_a_1ab7ad53
data.value: Play a system sound when a new connection is blocked or prompts

data.name: Xaml_No_decisions_yet_â_switch_to_da4e0810
data.value: No decisions yet - switch to Notify mode to get consent prompts for new connections.

data.name: Xaml_Save_the_loaded_connection_history_to_91aec34f
data.value: Save the loaded connection history to a CSV file (opens in Excel)

data.name: TrafficProfile_ExportTip
data.value: Save a redacted metadata-only traffic profile with protocol and port hints; no packet payloads are included

data.name: Xaml_Substring_match_on_process_remote_address_ed5726b7
data.value: Substring match on process, host, remote address, country, status, or protocol

data.name: History_ProcessName
data.value: Connection history app or process filter

data.name: History_HostName
data.value: Connection history domain or host filter

data.name: History_StatusName
data.value: Connection history action or firewall status filter

data.name: Xaml_Read_the_machine_s_current_Windows_7e27ca24
data.value: Read the machine's current Windows Firewall rules into HostsGuard's view (read-only; adopted rules are marked *)

data.name: Xaml_Show_only_firewall_rules_that_changed_7d356f72
data.value: Show only firewall rules that appeared, changed, or vanished after the baseline was seeded

data.name: Xaml_Filters_as_you_type_â_matches_4dd5c1e7
data.value: Filters as you type - matches rule name, remote address, service, or program

data.name: Xaml_Assign_the_selected_HG_rules_to_490e2bd6
data.value: Assign the selected HG_ rules to a named group you can enable/disable as a unit (blank name removes them)

data.name: Xaml_Clear_the_filter_turn_off_HostsGuard_811239c1
data.value: Clear the filter, turn off HostsGuard-only, or refresh to load current Windows Firewall rules.

data.name: Xaml_Enter_a_rule_name_before_creating_5207092e
data.value: Enter a rule name before creating a firewall rule

data.name: Xaml_Rules_created_here_use_the_HG_b7f8e3c1
data.value: Rules created here use the HG_ prefix, are owned by HostsGuard, and can be protected by Secure Rules.

data.name: Xaml_Remote_address_IP_CIDR_or_range_3aeffde3
data.value: Remote address: IP, CIDR, or range (empty = Any)

data.name: Xaml_When_locked_changing_filtering_mode_firewall_234ed002
data.value: When locked, changing filtering mode, firewall posture, or HG_ rules requires the password.

data.name: Xaml_Enforce_a_SYSTEM_Admins_only_DACL_680f041b
data.value: Enforce a SYSTEM+Admins-only DACL on the hosts file

data.name: Xaml_Set_the_password_that_protects_filtering_1de59e66
data.value: Set the password that protects filtering, posture, and HG_ rule changes

data.name: Xaml_Remove_the_settings_lock_after_entering_3792232c
data.value: Remove the settings lock after entering the password

data.name: Xaml_Temporarily_unlock_protected_actions_for_the_5440dfe8
data.value: Temporarily unlock protected actions for the configured number of minutes

data.name: Xaml_Flush_resolver_state_switch_Windows_DNS_dbece2f0
data.value: Flush resolver state, switch Windows DNS presets, and verify whether a domain is reachable or blocked.

data.name: Xaml_Enter_a_domain_to_resolve_and_bdf20a48
data.value: Enter a domain to resolve and check

data.name: Xaml_Domain_to_resolve_and_check_block_be2f0bc0
data.value: Domain to resolve and check block state

data.name: DnsCache_Help
data.value: List cached names from the Windows DNS Client and flush only the selected entry when a newly blocked host still resolves.

data.name: DnsCache_LoadTip
data.value: Read cached DNS names from the Windows DNS Client service.

data.name: DnsCache_FlushSelectedTip
data.value: Remove only the selected cached DNS name instead of flushing the whole cache.

data.name: DnsCache_SearchTip
data.value: Filter cached entries by name or record type.

data.name: DnsCache_LimitTip
data.value: Maximum number of cache rows to display, clamped from 1 to 2000.

data.name: Xaml_Browsers_using_their_own_Secure_DNS_97632c3b
data.value: Browsers using their own Secure DNS (DoH) resolve ad/tracker domains past the OS resolver, so they never appear in the feed and the hosts file cannot block them. Turn this on to force browser DNS back onto the OS resolver - then everything shows up and is blockable.

data.name: Xaml_See_everything_â_force_browser_DNS_11a79a3d
data.value: See everything - force browser DNS to the OS resolver

data.name: Xaml_One_click_block_QUIC_UDP_443_edd53016
data.value: One click: block QUIC/UDP-443 and the DoH bootstrap together so browser DNS falls back to the OS resolver and the activity feed can see (and block) what loads.

data.name: Xaml_Firewall_block_known_DoH_resolver_IPs_d179fd3d
data.value: Firewall-block known DoH resolver IPs + DoT/DoQ port 853 so apps and browsers can't tunnel DNS past hosts blocking. Your own resolvers stay exempt.

data.name: Xaml_Expected_SHA_256_of_the_remote_5d820f42
data.value: Expected SHA-256 of the remote list (required with a URL)

data.name: Xaml_Block_outbound_QUIC_HTTP3_UDP_port_6ce0d298
data.value: Block outbound QUIC/HTTP3 (UDP port 443). Forces clients to fall back to TCP so DoH3 and QUIC cannot bypass hosts/SNI blocking. Clean fallback - browsing keeps working.

data.name: Xaml_Forces_TCP_fallback_so_DoH3_QUIC_1377802e
data.value: Forces TCP fallback so DoH3/QUIC can't bypass blocking

data.name: Xaml_CNAME_cloak_defense_when_a_first_6bce35c8
data.value: CNAME-cloak defense: when a first-party host resolves via CNAME to a blocked tracker, block the fronting host too. Uses the live DNS resolution chain; requires the elevated DNS monitor.

data.name: Xaml_Blocks_first_party_hosts_that_alias_700a14d5
data.value: Blocks first-party hosts that alias to blocked trackers

data.name: Xaml_TLS_SNI_capture_NET_109_recover_f333e6fd
data.value: TLS SNI capture (NET-109): recover the hostname of HTTPS connections even when DNS was resolved over DoH, by reading the ClientHello SNI. Driver-free raw-socket capture; ECH-encrypted SNI stays unavailable.

data.name: Xaml_Names_HTTPS_dials_the_OS_resolver_79149379
data.value: Names HTTPS dials the OS resolver never saw (DoH), ECH excepted

data.name: Xaml_One_click_hosts_blocking_of_a_d41913d9
data.value: One-click hosts blocking of a service's primary domains. Best-effort: exact hostnames only; DoH can bypass it.

data.name: Xaml_Every_catalog_blocklist_is_downloaded_into_875a299b
data.value: Every catalog blocklist is downloaded into a local reference index (never imported as blocks). Feed domains found on these lists show yellow as block candidates.

data.name: Xaml_Re_download_every_catalog_list_into_7d99cc69
data.value: Re-download every catalog list into the index (runs for a few minutes)

data.name: Xaml_Uses_the_DeepSeek_API_to_bucket_45490066
data.value: Uses the DeepSeek API to bucket blocked domains into hosts-file categories (Google Ads, Microsoft Telemetry, etc.) and re-homes the entries under matching # Category sections. With auto-categorize on, every new manual block is filed automatically.

data.name: Xaml_Store_the_key_in_the_service_1493e7be
data.value: Store the key in the service's protected data folder (leave blank to keep the current key)

data.name: Xaml_File_every_new_manual_block_under_47dee3d1
data.value: File every new manual block under its AI-assigned category (save settings to apply)

data.name: Xaml_Send_every_uncategorized_blocked_domain_to_72e7027a
data.value: Send every uncategorized blocked domain to DeepSeek and organize the hosts file by category

data.name: Xaml_Save_everything_the_AI_has_learned_ed995f2f
data.value: Save everything the AI has learned (purposes, categories, connection info) to a reviewable JSON file

data.name: Xaml_Review_what_the_AI_has_learned_c10f330b
data.value: Review what the AI has learned and promote good labels into a user-curated store that beats the AI and survives restart. Discard wrong guesses. Every promotion/correction is remembered.

data.name: Xaml_List_what_the_AI_has_learned_3e46adb3
data.value: List what the AI has learned

data.name: Xaml_Advance_the_new_since_last_review_fbe3d1a0
data.value: Advance the 'new since last review' marker to now

data.name: Xaml_Show_only_entries_the_AI_learned_ecfbe106
data.value: Show only entries the AI learned since your last review

data.name: Xaml_Use_a_domain_service_target_or_59499d73
data.value: Use a domain, service target, or fw:HG_RuleName. Days accept Mon,Tue or 0-6; 24-hour windows can cross midnight.

data.name: Xaml_No_schedules_yet_Add_a_blocking_346560fe
data.value: No schedules yet. Add a blocking window, then save schedules.

data.name: Xaml_Save_named_snapshots_of_the_current_305311f0
data.value: Save named snapshots of the current policy, then switch them manually or let HostsGuard switch by network fingerprint.

data.name: Xaml_Name_for_a_snapshot_of_the_196c42ae
data.value: Name for a snapshot of the current rule set

data.name: Xaml_Enter_a_profile_name_before_saving_a706bf49
data.value: Enter a profile name before saving

data.name: Xaml_Back_up_harden_export_diagnostics_refresh_5026f167
data.value: Back up, harden, export diagnostics, refresh local intelligence, or recover the hosts file from a known-good state.

data.name: Xaml_Pre_allow_essential_Windows_binaries_Update_22ed5300
data.value: Pre-allow essential Windows binaries (Update, Defender, kernel) so ask-to-connect targets interesting traffic instead of prompting for OS infrastructure.

data.name: Xaml_Secure_Rules_the_service_recreates_or_894b4569
data.value: Secure Rules: the service recreates or re-enables any HostsGuard rule deleted or disabled behind its back. Only touches HG_ rules.

data.name: Xaml_Hosts_file_backups_in_the_service_4d6477de
data.value: Hosts-file backups in the service data directory

data.name: Xaml_Software_signed_by_these_Authenticode_publishers_6fac87af
data.value: Software signed by these Authenticode publishers is auto-allowed without a prompt. Add one from a consent prompt's Trust all software signed by... checkbox.

data.name: Xaml_Any_binary_under_these_folders_is_79c0059a
data.value: Any binary under these folders is auto-allowed without a prompt - the driver-free trust this whole install directory. Add one from a consent prompt's Trust all software in... checkbox.

data.name: Xaml_Block_ALL_outbound_whenever_the_chosen_031f3f4c
data.value: Block ALL outbound whenever the chosen VPN adapter is down, so nothing leaks outside the tunnel; the prior posture is restored on reconnect. Existing allow rules still apply - keep one for your VPN client so the tunnel can reconnect. Opt-in, off by default.

data.name: Xaml_Pick_the_network_adapter_your_VPN_771cf729
data.value: Pick the network adapter your VPN creates; when it drops the kill-switch engages

data.name: Xaml_Turn_the_VPN_kill_switch_on_2e253649
data.value: Turn the VPN kill-switch on or off

data.name: Xaml_This_action_is_applied_immediately_Review_690963d1
data.value: This action is applied immediately. Review the target before continuing.

data.name: Xaml_Save_applies_the_value_immediately_Cancel_bb5061bb
data.value: Save applies the value immediately. Cancel keeps the current setting.

data.name: Xaml_Review_the_process_destination_and_rule_625c4e34
data.value: Review the process, destination, and rule scope before allowing it.

data.name: Xaml_âš_This_remote_address_is_on_7025ed5c
data.value: Warning: this remote address is on the threat-intelligence list

data.name: Xaml_Warning_this_remote_address_is_on_2674dcd5
data.value: Warning: this remote address is on the threat-intelligence list

data.name: Xaml_Look_up_this_process_reputation_online_e5312c55
data.value: Look up this process reputation online

data.name: Xaml_Restrict_the_rule_to_this_remote_81fecf80
data.value: Restrict the rule to this remote IP address

data.name: Xaml_Restrict_the_rule_to_this_remote_00c2199f
data.value: Restrict the rule to this remote port

data.name: Xaml_Restrict_the_rule_to_this_protocol_6e4b38f9
data.value: Restrict the rule to this protocol

data.name: Xaml_Restrict_the_rule_to_the_owning_21045308
data.value: Restrict the rule to the owning Windows service

data.name: Xaml_Blocks_only_this_service_not_everything_1b90c1c7
data.value: Blocks only this service, not everything hosted by the same process (svchost)

data.name: Xaml_Restrict_the_rule_to_this_script_61fd89a5
data.value: Restrict the rule to this script or module

data.name: Xaml_Keeps_other_interpreter_scripts_separate_7febbc2b
data.value: Keeps other scripts run by the same interpreter separate

data.name: Xaml_Trust_all_software_signed_by_this_f4f554f6
data.value: Trust all software signed by this publisher

data.name: Xaml_On_Allow_auto_allow_any_future_9dd11626
data.value: On Allow, auto-allow any future binary signed by the same publisher without prompting

data.name: Xaml_Trust_all_software_in_this_folder_e1cab6fe
data.value: Trust all software in this folder

data.name: Xaml_On_Allow_auto_allow_any_future_155d44e6
data.value: On Allow, auto-allow any future binary under this program's folder without prompting

data.name: Xaml_Allow_all_pending_connections_from_this_f6b8a4c1
data.value: Allow all pending connections from this app

data.name: Xaml_Write_one_whole_app_allow_rule_46ffd33f
data.value: Write one whole-app allow rule and answer every pending prompt from this program

data.name: Xaml_Block_all_pending_connections_from_this_e8cbceda
data.value: Block all pending connections from this app

data.name: Xaml_Write_one_whole_app_block_rule_3cc8f54a
data.value: Write one whole-app block rule and answer every pending prompt from this program

data.name: Xaml_If_the_timer_expires_the_connection_53901c4b
data.value: If the timer expires, the connection stays blocked. By default the decision applies to the whole app; choose scope options to narrow it. Temporary decisions are removed automatically.

data.name: UsageRollups_TableName
data.value: Daily app and domain usage table

data.name: UsageQuota_MatchName
data.value: Usage quota app or domain match

data.name: LanSurface_Intro
data.value: Reversible one-click controls for chatty LAN discovery and legacy name lookup plus auto-proxy and inbound file sharing.

data.name: TopBand_RestoreSafeTip
data.value: Restore Normal filtering, allow default outbound, remove DNS bypass blocks, and leave hosts-file blocks unchanged.

data.name: Xaml_Restore_the_latest_policy_state_captured_74b7d23a
data.value: Restore the latest policy state captured before an import

data.name: Xaml_DnsRowActionMenuTargetNull
data.value: Right-click rows for full action menu

data.name: Xaml_SearchManagedDomainsHint
data.value: Search managed domains - try field:value or !term

data.name: Xaml_SearchConnectionsHint
data.value: Search connections - try process:chrome, port:443, or !svchost

data.name: Xaml_ExplainConnectionHint
data.value: Explain domain, IP, process, or path

data.name: Xaml_ChooseLiveRowTargetNull
data.value: Choose a live row to inspect

data.name: Xaml_RunAiIdentifyTargetNull
data.value: Run AI identify or use the lookup menu for context

data.name: Xaml_SearchRulesHint
data.value: Search rules by name, remote address, service, program, or package

data.name: Xaml_InspectDomainHint
data.value: Domain to resolve and check - e.g. tracker.example.com

data.name: Xaml_Adopt_manual_helper
data.value: When you edit the hosts file in a text editor, HostsGuard dedupes and organizes the whole file, categorizes entries, and imports the hand-added blocks into the managed list.

data.name: Xaml_Auto_adopt_tooltip
data.value: When on, hand-added block entries are imported automatically; a domain redirected to a real IP still raises a tamper alert.

data.name: Xaml_Adopt_now_tooltip
data.value: Dedupe, organize, categorize, and import any hand-added hosts entries right now.

data.name: Xaml_SeeEverythingOffButton
data.value: See everything (force browser DNS to OS resolver)

data.name: Xaml_SeeEverythingOnButton
data.value: See-everything is ON - click to turn off

data.name: PolicySub_Help
data.value: Subscribe to remote portable-policy JSON only after preview. Applies are manual by default, create restore checkpoints, and can pin the fetched SHA-256 hash.

data.name: PolicySub_NameTip
data.value: Friendly label for this remote policy feed.

data.name: PolicySub_UrlTip
data.value: Remote portable-policy JSON URL. The service enforces public HTTPS before fetching.

data.name: PolicySub_PinHashTip
data.value: When set, preview and apply fail if the fetched policy hash changes.

data.name: PolicySub_EnabledTip
data.value: Keep this subscription available for trusted refresh operations.

data.name: PolicySub_AutoApplyTip
data.value: Off by default. Only enabled subscriptions with this option are applied by the refresh action.

data.name: PolicySub_PinFetchedTip
data.value: Store the SHA-256 of the policy fetched during apply, so later changes require deliberate trust.

data.name: PolicySub_Empty
data.value: No policy subscriptions yet. Paste an HTTPS policy URL, preview the diff, then apply only if you trust the source.

data.name: PolicySub_StatusIntro
data.value: Add an HTTPS policy JSON subscription, preview it, then apply with a pinned source hash.

data.name: PolicySub_ConfirmApplyMessage
data.value: Create a restore checkpoint and apply this subscription?

data.name: PolicySub_StatusApplyCancelled
data.value: Policy subscription apply cancelled after preview.

data.name: PolicySub_ConfirmAutoApplyMessage
data.value: Apply every enabled policy subscription with auto-apply enabled now? Pinned hashes are enforced and each apply creates a restore checkpoint.

data.name: PolicySub_ConfirmRollbackMessage
data.value: Restore the checkpoint captured before the latest apply of '{0}'?

data.name: PolicySub_ConfirmRemoveMessage
data.value: Remove '{0}' from saved policy subscriptions? Applied policy is not rolled back.

data.name: Consent_DeliveryFailedBody
data.value: Your decision for {0} could not be applied — the service did not accept it. The connection stays blocked; it will prompt again on its next attempt.

data.name: IpBlock_Help
data.value: Enforce IP-format blocklists (one IPv4/IPv6 or CIDR per line, e.g. HaGeZi ips/doh or ips/tif) as HG_IPBlock_* Windows Firewall block rules — this stops hardcoded-IP endpoints and DoH-bootstrap IPs the hosts file cannot. Refreshes daily; a suspicious change is guarded and every refresh can be rolled back.

data.name: DnsAdapters_Help
data.value: Select adapters. VPN/tunnel interfaces require an explicit check. Current DHCP/static state is shown before apply.

data.name: IpBlock_NameTip
data.value: A short name for this IP blocklist source.

data.name: IpBlock_UrlTip
data.value: HTTPS URL of an IP-format list: one IP address or CIDR per line.

data.name: IpBlock_Empty
data.value: No IP blocklists yet. Import an IP-format list to write firewall block rules for hardcoded-IP endpoints.

data.name: IpBlock_StatusHint
data.value: Subscribe an IP-format list (one IP or CIDR per line) to firewall-block hardcoded-IP endpoints the hosts file cannot stop.

data.name: IpBlock_StatusLoaded
data.value: {0} IP blocklists · {1} addresses across {2} firewall rules.

data.name: UsageQuota_BlockOnExceedName
data.value: Block when the usage budget is exceeded

data.name: UsageQuota_BlockOnExceedTip
data.value: When the rolling window crosses the limit, apply a scoped block (hosts entry for a domain, firewall rules for an app). Clears automatically when usage falls back under the limit; disable or reset the rule to lift it immediately.

data.name: Health_Help
data.value: At-a-glance liveness of the elevated service: monitors, enforcement posture, activity persistence, database schema, and blocklist freshness.

data.name: Health_Empty
data.value: No health data yet. Refresh to query the service.

data.name: Health_StatusHint
data.value: Load the health glance to see monitor liveness, enforcement posture, and database state.

data.name: Health_PersistenceDropDetail
data.value: {0} writes dropped — the service is shedding DNS/SNI history

data.name: Health_NoSubsDetail
data.value: no subscribed sources have refreshed yet

data.name: Health_HostsScaleDetail
data.value: large enough to slow system-wide DNS — prefer firewall IP rules

data.name: Update_Help
data.value: Checks the GitHub release feed. Staging downloads the installer, verifies it against the SHA-256 the feed pins for that asset (rejected on mismatch), and applies it on the next service restart. Ships unsigned by project policy — the hash pin is the integrity check.

data.name: Update_StageTip
data.value: Downloads the latest installer, verifies its pinned SHA-256, and stages it; the service applies it the next time it starts.

data.name: Update_StatusHint
data.value: Check the release feed; staging downloads the installer, verifies its pinned SHA-256, and applies it on the next service restart.

data.name: Update_StagedSuffix
data.value: · staged {0} — applies on next service restart

data.name: Recovery_Help
data.value: Create a hash-verified recovery point for the database, hosts state, and non-secret service settings. Preview is required before restore.

data.name: Recovery_SnapshotPicker
data.value: Full-state snapshot to preview or restore

data.name: Proxy_Help
data.value: Compare per-user WinINET and machine WinHTTP proxy/PAC settings. Accepting records the current state; it never changes Windows settings.

data.name: Proxy_AcceptName
data.value: Accept current proxy and PAC state as baseline

data.name: Proxy_AcceptTip
data.value: Record legitimate enterprise or administrator changes without modifying them.

data.name: Proxy_Empty
data.value: No proxy settings have been inspected yet.

data.name: Proxy_StatusHint
data.value: Check current WinINET and WinHTTP proxy/PAC state against the accepted baseline.

data.name: Proxy_Changed
data.value: Proxy/PAC state differs from the accepted baseline.

data.name: Proxy_Unchanged
data.value: Proxy/PAC state matches the accepted baseline.

data.name: ListenerExposure_RefreshName
data.value: Scan local listeners and firewall coverage

data.name: ListenerExposure_SearchTip
data.value: Search process, endpoint, port, service, package, bind scope, profile, coverage, risk, or reason. Field filters such as port:443 and risk:high are supported.

data.name: ListenerExposure_Disclaimer
data.value: Snapshot only â€” coverage reflects active Windows Firewall rules. It does not prove reachability through routers, NAT, VPNs, or upstream controls.

data.name: ListenerExposure_TableName
data.value: Local listeners and effective firewall coverage

data.name: ListenerExposure_Empty
data.value: No listeners match the current scan and filter.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_Name
data.value: Firewall rule analysis and guarded cleanup

data.name: RuleAnalysis_ApplyName
data.value: Apply the unchanged previewed HostsGuard cleanup

data.name: RuleAnalysis_ApplyTip
data.value: Enabled only after the exact selected HG_ duplicates pass preview validation. A changed selection must be previewed again.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_GroupProvenanceName
data.value: Group findings by rule provenance instead of reason

data.name: RuleAnalysis_SearchTip
data.value: Search reason, rule, related rule, provenance, or remediation. Field filters such as source:HostsGuard and type:ExactDuplicate are supported.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_Disclaimer
data.value: Analysis is read-only. Cleanup is available only for selected HG_ exact duplicates; foreign, semantic, conflicting, ineffective, and Group Policy findings remain review-only.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_Empty
data.value: No findings match the current analysis and filter.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_SelectName
data.value: Select eligible HostsGuard duplicate for guarded cleanup

data.name: RuleAnalysis_None
data.value: No duplicate, contradictory, or ineffective rules found

data.name: RuleAnalysis_Count
data.value: {0} findings; review-only unless an HG_ exact duplicate is selected

data.name: RuleAnalysis_SelectionChanged
data.value: Selection changed; preview again before cleanup.

data.name: RuleAnalysis_ReviewOnlyTip
data.value: Foreign and non-exact findings are review-only

data.name: IdnHomograph_ObservedName
data.value: Observed international domain in stable ASCII or punycode form

data.name: IdnHomograph_EvidenceLabel
data.value: Scripts, restriction level, skeleton, and confusable target

data.name: IdnHomograph_NoBlockAlert
data.value: Alert only â€” HostsGuard did not block or rewrite this domain. Review the evidence before taking action.

data.name: IdnHomograph_ToggleTip
data.value: Opt in to Unicode UTS #39 confusability alerts. Detection never blocks a domain automatically.

data.name: IdnHomograph_ToolsHelp
data.value: Explains decoded IDNs, scripts, restriction level, and confusable targets in Alerts. Default off; alert-only.

data.name: IdnHomograph_NotLoaded
data.value: IDN homograph detection status not loaded.

data.name: IdnHomograph_OnStatus
data.value: Alert-only detection is on Â· {0} comparison targets Â· {1}. No automatic block is applied.

data.name: IdnHomograph_OffStatus
data.value: Off by default. When enabled, structured evidence appears in Alerts; no automatic block is applied.

data.name: FwRules_EditManagedTip
data.value: Load this HG_ rule into the authoring form. Windows and Group Policy rules remain read-only.

data.name: FwRules_EditManagedOnly
data.value: Only HostsGuard-managed HG_ rules can be edited here.

data.name: FwRules_PortsTip
data.value: TCP/UDP only. Use Any, comma-separated ports, or ascending ranges from 1 to 65535.

data.name: FwRules_ManualInterfacesTip
data.value: Enter an exact current Windows interface alias; unknown aliases are rejected.

data.name: FwRules_InterfacesNotLoaded
data.value: Interface aliases not loaded. Refresh to validate exact current aliases.

data.name: FwRules_NoInterfaces
data.value: No current interface aliases returned; named interface scoping is unavailable.

data.name: FwRules_PortFormatError
data.value: use comma-separated ports or ascending ranges from 1 to 65535

data.name: FwRules_PortsNeedProtocol
data.value: select TCP or UDP when restricting ports

data.name: FwRules_InterfaceFormatError
data.value: Interface aliases must be comma-separated visible names (maximum 64, 256 characters each).

data.name: FwRules_ScopePreview
data.value: Preview: {0} {1} | {2} | {3} | local ports {4} | remote ports {5} | interfaces {6} | {7}

data.name: Ncsi_WarningHelp
data.value: This warning applies only to the exact probe domains shown below, not Microsoft domains generally. Import remains available. Recovery persistently allows only list-owned probe blocks; unrelated or manual blocks are rejected.

data.name: Ncsi_RecoverActionName
data.value: Allow the exact affected Windows probe domains and revert their list blocks

data.name: Ncsi_RecoverTip
data.value: One click allowlists only the exact shown domains that are currently blocked by a list. You can deliberately block them again later.

data.name: Ncsi_WarningStatus
data.value: This list contains {0} exact Windows connectivity-check domain(s). Import remains available.

data.name: Ncsi_PreviewStatus
data.value: Preview found {0} exact Windows connectivity-check domain(s). Import remains available; recovery becomes available after import.

data.name: Ncsi_WouldBlock
data.value: would be blocked by this list
